---
title: "William Medwid"
image: profile.jpg
image-shape: round
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/william-medwid-8a5814178/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/GenghisKhandybar
---

::: column-page
## Bio

I'm William, a data engineer with an M.S. in Statistics from Cal Poly, and 4 years experience in the field. Between my work at Meta, Amazon, and Applied Orthopedic Design, I've helped many professional teams make high-stakes decisions in an informed, data-based manner.

I love collecting data and making it into beautiful plots and insights. I've set up this site to showcase those data analyses, as well as some technical writing and other projects. I aim to raise the bar on plots, with clear consistent styling, data labels that don't force you to turn your head, and more.

In each post, you'll find the code folded so that you can easily see the techniques to process the data in R and make plots (usually with GGplot) - the site's source code is also available to see on [GitHub](https://github.com/GenghisKhandybar/portfolio-blog/tree/main/posts).
:::
